description: Archived resolved residuals from Cursor security automation #351d19c7 on PR #42. Two medium findings addressed in merge commit 3b24aaf (V1.34). 1 finding (R-CURSOR-PR42-03) remains open and is registered in root status.json under '2026-06-04-v1.34-cursor-pr42-stage-status' key.

entries.title: Permission policy bypass for nexus.* tools — load_permission_policy only honored [grant], ignored [deny]/[default]
entries.target: RESOLVED in 3b24aaf (merge commit). load_permission_policy now loads grant + deny + default; WorkspacePermissionPolicy::evaluate applies grant-before-deny; explicit [deny] blocks tools even with wildcard [grant]. Mirror of PermissionPolicy::evaluate without linking nexus-acp-host.
entries.closure_note: Permission policy Gate 4 now enforces grant/deny/default with grant-before-deny precedence. Cursor security automation revalidation (RUN_ID bc-52739238, 2026-06-05) marked this finding as resolved.

entries.title: FL-E workflow gate bypass via Local API PATCH /v1/local/works/{id} — check_stage_advance always called with force: true
entries.target: RESOLVED in 3b24aaf (merge commit). PATCH /v1/local/works/{id} now uses force: false by default; callers must pass {"force": true} to skip stage-order gates (equivalent to CLI --force). Tests updated.
entries.closure_note: Force default flipped to false; PATCH gate now matches CLI --force semantics. Cursor revalidation (RUN_ID bc-52739238, 2026-06-05) marked this finding as resolved.
